# HaulBrokr

HaulBrokr is the premium dump truck marketplace connecting contractors who need dirt, gravel, fill, and construction material hauled with verified dump truck operators and fleets. Customers post a haul request, receive competitive bids, track dump trucks in real time, and pay securely. Operators use HaulBrokr to find nearby loads, manage dispatch, upload digital tickets, and get paid faster.

## Public Pages

- Home: https://haulbrokr.com/
- Support: https://haulbrokr.com/support
- Privacy Policy: https://haulbrokr.com/privacy
